---
title: "Appendix"
output: html_document
---

# Appendix A. R Code for Total Coral Area Analysis

# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
library(MuMIn)
library(performance)
library(DHARMa)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(multcompView)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)

# Import and format data
combined_df <- read_excel("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Data Sets/combined_coral_benthic_fish.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    Year = factor(Year),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = c("Con", "1x1", "2x2", "TopOnly")),
    Block = factor(Block)
  )

# Filter to Phase 1 analysis years
combined_df1 <- combined_df |> 
  filter(!Year %in% c(2018, 2023, 2024))

# Scale continuous ecological predictors
combined_df2 <- combined_df1 |> 
  mutate(across(
    c(CCA_calcareous, Fleshy_MA, `Lobo/Peys`,
      Scleractinian, SPAT, TAS,
      Grazerdetritivore, Herbivore_Sc_Br),
    scale
  ))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Treatment and Year Model Comparison
# ------------------------------------------------------------

t1 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

t2 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

t3 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment + Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

t4 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment * Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

anova(t1, t2, t3, t4)

# Final treatment + year model
area_treat_year_model <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment + Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

# Model output and diagnostics
broom.mixed::tidy(area_treat_year_model, effects = "fixed")
MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(area_treat_year_model)
AIC(area_treat_year_model)
performance::check_collinearity(area_treat_year_model)
performance::check_overdispersion(area_treat_year_model)
car::Anova(area_treat_year_model, type = "III")

# DHARMa residual diagnostics
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(area_treat_year_model)
plot(sim_res)
testUniformity(sim_res)
testDispersion(sim_res)

# Estimated marginal means by treatment
emm_response <- emmeans(area_treat_year_model, ~ Treatment, type = "response")
emm_response
pairs(emm_response)
cld(emm_response, Letters = letters)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Full Ecological Predictor Model
# ------------------------------------------------------------

full_area <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ 
    Year + 
    CCA_calcareous +
    Fleshy_MA +
    `Lobo/Peys` +
    SPAT +
    TAS +
    Grazerdetritivore +
    Herbivore_Sc_Br +
    (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

# AIC model selection
options(na.action = "na.fail")

area_dredge <- dredge(full_area, fixed = "Year")
area_dredge

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Final Total Coral Area Model with TAS
# ------------------------------------------------------------

total_area_model <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Year + TAS + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)

# Model output and diagnostics
broom.mixed::tidy(total_area_model, effects = "fixed")
MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(total_area_model)
AIC(total_area_model)
performance::check_collinearity(total_area_model)
performance::check_overdispersion(total_area_model)
car::Anova(total_area_model, type = "III")

# DHARMa residual diagnostics
sim_res <- simulateResiduals(total_area_model)
plot(sim_res)
testUniformity(sim_res)
testDispersion(sim_res)

# Generate model predictions for TAS figure
tas_pred <- ggpredict(total_area_model, terms = c("TAS", "Year")) |>
  rename(Year = group)
